title: Limited applicability to foreign corporations
doc_html:
§1-1702.  Limited applicability to foreign corporations

Except where express reference is made to foreign corporations, this Chapter does not apply to foreign corporations.

Acts 2014, No. 328, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
